subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! The verses, like scattered pearls, were received, and they possessed the utmost sweetness and fluidity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله اشعار چون لئالی منثور منظور گردید در نهایت حلاوت و سلاست بود و در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
